india_trends.title: Oil Edges Lower Following Spike With Hormuz Stalemate in Focus
india_trends.summary: Oil edged lower, paring Monday’s gain, as traders tracked tensions in the Middle East after fresh clashes between the US and Iran.

india_trends.title: Kiran Mazumdar-Shaw names niece as successor, but she is ‘not hanging up boots yet’; who is Claire Mazumdar?
india_trends.summary: Kiran Mazumdar of Biocon names her niece, Claire Mazumdar, as her successor, with a gradual transition over five years. She remains focused on advancing biotechnology and AI integration within the company while preparing for growth.&nbsp;

india_trends.title: Shockproof India? Tops emerging market resilience charts as peers play catch-up: Moody’s Ratings
india_trends.summary: Since the onset of global economic challenges in 2020, India has emerged as a powerhouse among developing markets. According to a Moody's analysis, India's growth trajectory outshines countries like Mexico and Brazil. This success is largely due to proactive policy reforms and a resilient financial

india_trends.title: Vodafone Idea, HFCL, JP Power, HCC, Meesho, Ola Electric Mobility among the most traded stocks today, 5 May 2026
india_trends.summary: Most traded stocks today: Vodafone Idea, HFCL, Jaiprakash Power Ventures (JP Power), Meesho, Ola Electric Mobility, Hindustan Construction Company (HCC), and Vedanta were among the most traded stocks, or most active stocks in terms of volume, on the NSE on Tuesday.

india_trends.title: BSE SME stock hits 5% upper circuit despite Indian stock market sell-off
india_trends.summary: HRS Aluglaze's stock hit the 5% upper circuit at ₹225.75 on May 5, despite market declines. The company secured a ₹1.31 crore work order for aluminium windows from PSP Projects, enhancing its order book and revenue visibility over the next four months.

india_trends.title: Indo-Pacific trade pact losing relevance under Trump’s aggressive strategy: GTRI
india_trends.summary: The Indo-Pacific Economic Framework for Prosperity, widely known as IPEF, faces significant hurdles. Recent analyses indicate that the foundation of the framework may be weakening, largely attributed to the trade policies introduced during Donald Trump’s presidency.

india_trends.title: Amazon logistics push rattles Delhivery, stock drops over 4%
india_trends.summary: Delhivery shares fell over 4% following Amazon's introduction of its bundled logistics service, ASCS. This move signals intensified competition in the logistics sector, causing significant declines in stock prices of other logistics companies such as FedEx and UPS.

india_trends.title: Zoho's Vembu flaunts his vibrant electric auto in viral post; shares heartwarming encounter with man behind its battery
india_trends.summary: Social media users were surprised to discover that Sridhar Vembu rides an auto for his daily commute and showered him with praise for his conscious choices for the environment.

india_trends.title: NSE introduces Electronic Gold Receipts: What are they, how to trade and benefits explained
india_trends.summary: EGRs is backed by physical gold; the investors, at their discretion, can surrender the EGRs and take physical delivery of the corresponding quantity and quality of gold.

india_trends.title: Smallcap winners! Wockhardt, Tata Tech, CAMS, other stocks rally up to 11% despite overall market weakness
india_trends.summary: Smallcap stocks outperformed on Tuesday despite weak broader markets, with Wockhardt, Tata Tech and CAMS gaining up to 11% on strong Q4 earnings. While Nifty 50 slipped below 24,000 amid global concerns, improving momentum and technical indicators signal potential continued strength in the smallcap

india_trends.title: Cash is king again? India’s withdrawals surge 12% in early April, highest since post-demonetisation
india_trends.summary: The Indian economy is witnessing a historic milestone as the currency in circulation hits 42.3 trillion rupees. This remarkable jump of more than 610 billion rupees in merely 15 days of April signals a transformative phase. Experts warn that this continuous cash demand surge may impact the liquidity

india_trends.title: HFCL shares rise 4% after securing Rs 84 crore optical fiber cable orders
india_trends.summary: HFCL shares rose after it, along with subsidiary HTL Limited, secured new orders worth Rs 84.23 crore from a domestic telecom provider. The deal involves supplying customized optical fiber cables, with execution expected by August 2026, strengthening the company’s position in telecom infrastructure.

india_trends.title: Gold Edges Higher on Dip Buying While Inflation Risks Still Loom
india_trends.summary: Gold edged higher on signs dip buyers stepped into the market after a flare-up in hostilities in the Middle East pushed down prices by 2% on Monday.

india_trends.title: Bitcoin crosses $80K as geopolitical easing boosts risk appetite; $270M short liquidations aid surge
india_trends.summary: Bitcoin surged past the $80,000 mark, driven by a combination of institutional demand, shrinking supply, and a decline in oil-driven inflation hedges. Geopolitical de-escalation also contributed to a risk-on sentiment, boosting the cryptocurrency's performance despite some volatility in major altcoi
